title: Rename device - close/open the General tab
scenario: Device name change does not persist after closing and reopening the General tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Tap the General tab within Device Settings.
4. Tap the device's official name field to edit it.
5. Enter a new custom name for the device.
6. Tap Done to save the new name.
7. Close the General tab by navigating back or tapping outside the tab.
8. Reopen the General tab in Device Settings.
9. Observe the device name displayed in the name field.
expected: The custom name entered in step 5 is still displayed in the device name field after reopening the General tab.
